notes.en: Adds the AI Tasks workflow for staged Agent work, including leases, review handoff, CLI/MCP access, and a compact workspace UI.
notes.zh-CN: 新增 AI Tasks 工作流，支持阶段化 Agent 任务、租约、验收交接、CLI/MCP 调用和紧凑工作区界面。

en: Added AI Tasks as a dedicated workspace separate from regular Todo.
Added ordered feature stages with active-stage parallelism and locked later stages.
Added Agent-safe claim, lease renewal, release, review submit, reject, and accept flows.
Added CLI and MCP interfaces for features, stages, tasks, claimable tasks, and review handoff.
Added a compact AI Tasks UI with feature/stage navigation, task rows, detail panels, and event history.
Added an Agent guide for discovery, lease, retry, and submit workflows.
Added idempotent request-id handling and explicit failure states.
zh-CN: 新增独立于普通 Todo 的 AI Tasks 工作区。
新增有序阶段，支持当前阶段并行执行和后续阶段锁定。
新增 Agent 安全领取、续租、释放、提交验收、驳回和通过流程。
新增 CLI 与 MCP 接口，覆盖大功能、阶段、任务、可领取任务和验收交接。
新增紧凑 AI Tasks 界面，包含功能/阶段导航、任务行、详情面板和事件记录。
新增 Agent 调用说明，覆盖发现、租约、重试和提交验收流程。
补齐 request-id 幂等处理和显式失败状态。
